2026-03-31T08:21:14.2152578Z 
2026-03-31T08:21:15.1236424Z 1. **`AzureClouds` enum** (line 190–194): Members use `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (`AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD`, etc.) — should be PascalCase per Azure SDK guidelines.
2026-03-31T08:21:15.1242085Z 2. **`AzureSupportedClouds` type** (line 224): Closed template literal type `\`${AzureClouds}\`` — should be `string` for forward extensibility.
2026-03-31T08:21:15.1244214Z 
2026-03-31T08:21:15.1271978Z Both are recurring TypeSpec codegen patterns seen across several other management SDK PRs. No tool issues (CHANGELOG, `apiRefLink`, or version mismatches).

2026-03-31T08:21:29.2189025Z ##[group]Run # Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2189297Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2189454Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2189812Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2190165Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2190283Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2190438Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2190523Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2190721Z [36;1m  echo 'AWF binary not installed, skipping firewall log summary'[0m
2026-03-31T08:21:29.2190800Z [36;1mfi[0m
